AMZN.rationale: AMZN trades at 35.9x P/E with strong fundamentals (10.1% net margin, 21.6% ROE) and has rallied +15.3% over 3 months, but the elevated multiple vs its 1y range (30.3-56.6x) and stretched valuation cap further upside, while positive news sentiment and AI/AWS tailwinds support a mild long lean.

ROE of 21.6% and operating margin of 11% indicate solid fundamentals
Stock has rallied +15.3% over 3 months and +10.9% over 1 year, limiting near-term upside
News sentiment consistently positive (avg ~+0.65 over 2 weeks) with AI/AWS tailwinds

MMM.rationale: Fair valuation and high-quality fundamentals (96.8% ROE) are offset by elevated leverage (D/E 2.98) and a +47.6% one-year run that has largely priced in the recovery, leaving only a mild positive risk/reward.

Exceptional ROE of 96.8% and 17.9% net margin support fundamental quality
Elevated debt/equity at 2.979 is the dominant risk factor limiting upside
Stock already up +47.6% over 1y to $152.24, much of the recovery priced in
Q1 2025 EPS of $2.04 on $5.95B revenue shows stable earnings power
